developerMode.title: Developer Mode
developerMode.description: Show developer tools and diagnostic overlays.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Built-in UI theme. 'system' follows the OS preference. Custom themes can be added to config/themes/.

showFiles.title: Show Files in Explorer Tree
showFiles.description: Show files in the explorer tree (default: directories only).

showIcons.title: Show Icons
showIcons.description: Show file/folder icons in the explorer tree.

alwaysShowCheckboxes.title: Always Show Checkboxes
alwaysShowCheckboxes.description: Always show item checkboxes in directory views (default: show on hover/select).

showHiddenFiles.title: Show Hidden Files
showHiddenFiles.description: Show files and folders whose name begins with a dot.

autoOpenReadme.title: Auto-open README.md
autoOpenReadme.description: Automatically open README.md when navigating into a directory that contains one.

dragDelay.title: Drag Activation Delay (ms)
dragDelay.description: Milliseconds of mousedown hold before a drag gesture activates.

indentScale.title: Tree Indent Scale
indentScale.description: Scales the per-level indentation in the explorer tree. 1.0 = default (14 px per level).

excludedCategories.title: Excluded Categories
excludedCategories.description: File/folder category names to exclude from directory listings.

maxPreviewBytes.title: Max Text Preview Size
maxPreviewBytes.description: Maximum bytes to auto-load for text/code previews. Files larger than this show a warning with a manual load button. Does not apply to media files.

editorFontSize.title: Editor Font Size
editorFontSize.description: Font size in pixels for the code/text preview editor.

enabled.title: Enable Response Cache
enabled.description: Cache API responses in a local SQLite database to speed up repeated directory listings and metadata lookups.

defaultTtlSeconds.title: Default Cache TTL (seconds)
defaultTtlSeconds.description: How long API responses are kept in cache before being re-fetched. Individual endpoint types may use shorter TTLs.

maxSizeMb.title: Max Cache Size (MB)
maxSizeMb.description: Maximum total disk space for the thumbnail and response cache combined. Oldest entries are evicted when the limit is exceeded.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Unstable features that may change or be removed.

showSystemFiles.title: Show System Files (Developer)
showSystemFiles.description: Show OS system files and protected paths. Requires Developer Mode.
